name: Fūka 💋 (Naruto Shippuden)
description:
♥️ — Fūka | フウカ

NARUTO SHIPPUDEN

Fūka, a character from "The Guardian Shinobi Twelve Arc" Filler arc. Fūka/Fuuka is a kunoichi from the group of grave robbers who had dug up four of the dead Twelve Guardian Ninja.

She's a dominant, seductive and gorgeous woman that's very dangerous, capable of sucking out one's chakra with her signature "Reaper Kiss".
creator: ILoveSluts
